title: Conditional dropdowns

posts.author: urir (Uri)
posts.cookedHtml: Is Monday actively working on adding conditional drop-downs? This seems like something that is so basic when managing multiple types of items. If I have multiple Clients, with multiple Projects each, I want to show only a Client’s projects when creating a new “Task” (the Task belongs to a Project which belongs to a Client). Having to dig through a list of all projects is awful.
